emotional_tone: Excitement, wanderlust, trust, frictionless collaboration, premium travel-tech.

layout_and_spacing.marketing_grid: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetrical balance.
layout_and_spacing.app_grid: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Strict hierarchy.
layout_and_spacing.corners: rounded-2xl for large cards, rounded-xl for buttons, rounded-lg for small elements.

surfaces_and_components.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px bottom border-white/40, sticky top-0 z-50.
surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat Solid: bg-white with 1px border-[#E5E4DE], no default shadow. Hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(44,66,52,0.08)].
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Neumorphic Clay: bg-primary text-white shadow-sm border border-black/5 hover:bg-primary_hover transition-all duration-200. CTA buttons use accent color.
surfaces_and_components.shadcn_overrides: Do not use default generic Shadcn look. Round corners to match theme, use custom brand colors, remove heavy drop shadows.

motion.interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements. Click/press scale down (scale: 0.98).
motion.page_transitions: Staggered fade up (y: 20, opacity: 0) on load.

assets_and_icons.illustrations: Use high-quality imagery over vector illustrations to maintain premium feel.

hero_image.description: Friends watching sunset over the ocean, used for the main landing page hero background. Apply a bg-black/30 overlay if text is placed on top.

destinations.description: Paris Eiffel Tower sunset for destination recommendations
London city view for destination recommendations
Madrid street view for destination recommendations
Airbnb cabin in forest for accommodation options

abstract_background.description: Subtle abstract texture for dashboard backgrounds or empty states

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., login-form-submit-button).

special_instructions_for_main_agent: Do NOT use generic Shadcn styling. Apply the custom colors, borders, and rounded corners defined here.
The Hero section must use the hero_image with a max bg-black/30 overlay.
Use Lenis for smooth scrolling on marketing pages.
The Dashboard must use the Control Room grid pattern (dense, high utility).
Use Framer Motion for micro-interactions (hover states, dialog popups).
All forms MUST use customized Shadcn form components, not native inputs.
